headline: This Retail Giant Offers A High Dividend And Trades Near Buy Zone
summary: While the decline of brick-and-mortar storefronts has been well documented, Best Buy plans to open new stores in 2027.

headline: Best Buy Has Good Prospects For Another Comeback
summary: Best Buy (BBY) names Jason Bonfig CEO, accelerating marketplace and retail media growth. Read here for a detailed investment analysis.
